name: AWS Certified Machine Learning Engineer – Associate (MLA-C01)
description: Associate-level certification for ML engineers building and deploying ML solutions on AWS. Validates ability to implement ML pipelines, select models, deploy and monitor solutions. Experience with ML on AWS recommended. 85 questions, 170 minutes.

domains.name: Data Preparation for ML
domains.description: Domain 1 (28%): Ingest and store data for ML workloads, transform and engineer features, ensure data quality and governance for ML.

domains.name: ML Model Development
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Choose modeling approach (SageMaker, Bedrock), train and evaluate ML models, select and refine models.

domains.name: Deployment and Orchestration of ML Workflows
domains.description: Domain 3 (22%): Select deployment infrastructure (endpoints, batch), create and script ML pipelines, orchestrate end-to-end workflows.

domains.name: ML Solution Monitoring, Maintenance, and Security
domains.description: Domain 4 (24%): Monitor model performance (drift, bias), maintain ML solutions, secure ML workloads.
